scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --project-directory . -f deployment/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev:infra && npx concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && npx concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent,mcp -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run langgraph dev --port 8123
scripts.postinstall: command -v uv > /dev/null 2>&1 && (cd apps/agent && uv sync) || true
